title: Playing Basketball 打篮球
scene: Tom和Mike在操场上打篮球，练习投篮和传球。

lines.en: Hey Mike, do you want to play basketball after school?
Sure! I love basketball. Let me get my ball.
lines.zh: 当然！我喜欢篮球。让我去拿球。

lines.en: Great! I will practice shooting today.
lines.zh: 太好了！我今天练习投篮。

lines.en: Can you pass me the ball first?
Nice pass! Now I will shoot.
lines.zh: 传球不错！现在我来投篮。

lines.en: Good shot! You are getting better.
OK. First one to score five points wins.
You are on! Let us go!
